title: heliophila astyla
intro: Heliophila astyla, also known as the 'blazing stars' or ' annual heliophila', is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Heliophila astyla include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat skin conditions such as acne and wounds, and act as an antioxidant. Heliophila astyla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
